title: Positive economic data in China boosts sentiment
section_path: Positive economic data in China boosts sentiment
section_path_text: Positive economic data in China boosts sentiment
summary:
Main
Ongoing inflationary pressures in the US put further doubts on imminent rate cuts. A weaker USD also weighed on investor appetite for commodities. By Daniel Hynes
Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2024-05-01 111505.png | assets/2024-05-01_positive-economic-data-in-china-boosts-sentiment_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_559acced9fd3.png
Copper rallied past USD10,000/t following better-than-expected economic data in China.
